title: Argparse Interface, Help, Options, and Usage Errors · Code Recall
summary: A delayed maintenance review reconstructs argparse interface, help, options, and usage errors from repository state, input bytes, decoded text, tokens, counters, ranking keys, report records, stdout, stderr, exit status, tests, package artifact, and release evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for testable user-facing command interface after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defe…
objectives: Define positional input and explicit encoding, token, ranking, format, width, and limit options from user tasks.
Reject invalid ranges, conflicting flags, unsupported choices, and missing values at the parser boundary with usage evidence.
Write task-oriented usage, descriptions, metavariables, defaults, units, examples, exit behavior, and accessibility notes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-bookbot-python cumulative Unicode-safe text-analysis portfolio.

Browser execution uses original fixed in-memory fixtures and deterministic pure-Python models only.
Host files, terminals, subprocesses, Git mutations, package installation, native profiling, load,
operating-system races, publication, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class TextPolicy:
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    normalization: str = "NFC"
    casefold: bool = True
    top_k: int = 10


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    corpus_id: str
    revision: str
    policy_version: str
    command_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Bookbot portfolio ready"

steps.title: Bookbot and Python Record what required effort · Review Python314 Argparse
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Python314 Argparse: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review Bookbot team handles case 7050 during a digital-humanities corpus revision. Build deterministic Python evidence to define and validate a reproducible task-oriented argparse interface with useful help; retain source permission, digest purpose, revision, Python, Unicode, policy, command, and output identity; then split one word and one UTF-8 sequence across stream chunks and compare batch output byte-for-byte. Browser code uses pure bounded functions and original fixed fixtures only. Real files, terminals, subprocesses, Git mutations, packages, installations, native profiling, operating-system races, load, publication, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Control Python 3.14 suggestion, color, abbreviation, and execution-name behavior explicitly where reproducibility requires it.

Evidence target: Bookbot and Python Record what required effort · Review Python314 Argparse.
steps.why: Retrieving Python314 Argparse through the concrete testable user-facing command interface case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Bookbot and Python Record what required effort · Review Python314 Argparse, keep Python314 Argparse connected to executable Python text-analysis, command, test, package, and release decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Control Python 3.14 suggestion, color, abbreviation, and execution-name behavior explicitly where reproducibility requires it.

Browser code uses pure bounded functions and original fixed fixtures only. Real files, terminals, subprocesses, Git mutations, packages, installations, native profiling, operating-system races, load, publication, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Control Python 3.14 suggestion, color, abbreviation, and execution-name behavior explicitly where reproducibility requires it.
